tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low total CO₂, and significant proteinuria, suggesting possible renal impairment or early kidney disease. Urine is cloudy, brown, with low specific gravity, and contains glucose, protein, bilirubin, and ketones, but no infection markers. Hemoglobin A1c is low, which may indicate anemia or altered red cell turnover. Recommend further renal evaluation and correlation with clinical findings.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
